content:
## Mindmap

### Focus topics
- mindmap

### Source-grounded notes
- CO3: Optimize transportation and warehousing operations in the supply chain.
- CO4: Explore and analyze emerging technologies and their impact on supply chains.
- Pedagogy: Classroom teaching is supported by White board, black board, chalks, markers, projector and screen.
- The hand-written notes, Power Point slides and assignments will be provided to the students and also mailed to them.
- The students can also raise their issues related to the course in the class and mail.

_LLM generation is currently unavailable, so these notes use cleaned retrieved context only._
